```{r}
#| label: process data chunks
#| echo: false
knitr::read_chunk("../R/process_data.R")
```

# Process the data

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Macroalgae cover

1. prepare factors

```{r}
#| label: process data v3b
#| results: markup
#| eval: true
#| echo: true
#| cache: false
```

2. filter to just the cases where k490 has been observed

```{r}
#| label: process mmp data v3b
#| results: markup
#| eval: false
#| echo: true
#| cache: false
```

## Macroalgae groups

1. prepare factors and calculate relative (proportional) abundance (as
   is required for Dirichlet)

```{r}
#| label: process ma data v3b
#| results: markup
#| eval: false
#| echo: true
#| cache: false
```

2. filter to just the cases where k490 has been observed

```{r}
#| label: process ma sites data v3b
#| results: markup
#| eval: false
#| echo: true
#| cache: false
```

## Brown algae groups

:::
